sessions.summary: Completed task group 1 (Write failing spec tests) for specification 01_core_foundation. Created pyproject.toml, package skeleton with stub modules, conftest fixtures, and all test files covering TS-01-1 through TS-01-12, TS-01-E1 through TS-01-E7, and TS-01-P1 through TS-01-P5. All 107 tests collect successfully; 46 fail as expected (stubs raise NotImplementedError), 61 pass (error hierarchy is complete, CLI basic behavior works via Click).

tests_added_or_modified.description: Shared fixtures: cli_runner (CliRunner) and tmp_git_repo (temporary git repository)
CLI tests: TS-01-1 (version), TS-01-2 (help), TS-01-E1 (unknown subcommand)
Config tests: TS-01-3 (defaults), TS-01-4 (overrides), TS-01-5 (invalid type), TS-01-E2 (missing file), TS-01-E3 (invalid TOML), TS-01-E7 (unknown keys)
Model registry tests: TS-01-9 (tier resolution), TS-01-10 (cost calc), TS-01-E5 (unknown model)
Error hierarchy tests: TS-01-11 (hierarchy check with parametrize)
Theme tests: TS-01-12 (playful toggle), TS-01-E6 (invalid color fallback)
Property tests: TS-01-P1 (config defaults completeness), TS-01-P2 (numeric clamping)
Property tests: TS-01-P3 (cost non-negativity), TS-01-P4 (registry completeness), TS-01-P5 (error hierarchy catches)
Init integration tests: TS-01-6 (creates structure), TS-01-7 (idempotent), TS-01-8 (gitignore), TS-01-E4 (no git)

sessions.summary: Completed task group 2 (Implement error hierarchy and model registry) from specification 01_core_foundation. Finalized the error hierarchy docstring in errors.py, implemented the full model registry with MODEL_REGISTRY and TIER_DEFAULTS data, resolve_model() for tier/model-ID lookup, calculate_cost() for USD cost estimation, and updated the domain types stub. All 68 targeted spec and property tests pass; no regressions.

Implemented task group 3 (configuration system) for specification 01_core_foundation. Added TOML config loading with pydantic validation, numeric clamping via field validators, unknown key handling via ConfigDict(extra='ignore'), and proper error conversion from pydantic ValidationError to ConfigError. All 13 config tests (9 unit + 4 property) now pass with zero regressions (81 total tests passing).

Implemented task group 4 (CLI, theme, logging, and init command) for specification 01_core_foundation. Created the theme system (AppTheme with Rich console, color roles, playful/neutral messages, invalid style fallback), logging setup (setup_logging with verbose/quiet/default levels), CLI entry point (Click group with --version/--verbose/--quiet, banner display, subcommand registration), and init command (directory structure creation, default config.toml generation, develop branch creation, .gitignore updates, idempotency, git repo check). All 107 tests pass, linter clean, mypy clean.

Checkpoint verification for task group 5 of specification 01_core_foundation. All 107 tests pass, ruff linter clean, mypy type check clean, CLI version command works, and agent-fox init works end-to-end in a fresh git repo. Marked checkpoint checkbox as complete.

Implemented task group 1 (Write failing spec tests) for specification 02_planning_engine. Created 80 failing tests across 10 test files covering all test spec entries (TS-02-1 through TS-02-11, TS-02-E1 through TS-02-E8, TS-02-P1 through TS-02-P5). Also created stub modules for spec discovery, parser, graph types, builder, resolver, fast-mode filter, and persistence with NotImplementedError placeholders. All 80 new tests fail (red) as expected, all 107 existing tests pass (no regressions), and linter checks pass cleanly.

tests_added_or_modified.description: fixtures for spec discovery and parser tests with sample tasks.md content
TS-02-1, TS-02-2, TS-02-E1, TS-02-E2, TS-02-E3: spec discovery sorted, filter, errors
TS-02-3, TS-02-4, TS-02-E7, TS-02-E8: task group parsing, optional markers, edge cases
fixtures for graph tests: acyclic, cyclic, optional-node, cross-spec graphs
TS-02-5, TS-02-6, TS-02-E5: intra-spec edges, cross-spec edges, dangling references
TS-02-7, TS-02-E4: topological sort, cycle detection, deterministic tie-breaking
TS-02-8, TS-02-9: fast-mode removal of optional nodes, dependency rewiring
TS-02-P1, TS-02-P4: topological order validity, cycle detection completeness
TS-02-P2, TS-02-P3, Property 7: dependency preservation, ID uniqueness, skipped count
TS-02-P5: discovery sort order property test
TS-02-10, TS-02-11, TS-02-E6: plan persistence roundtrip, CLI end-to-end, corrupted plan

sessions.summary: Implemented task group 2 of specification 02_planning_engine: completed the graph types module by implementing the ready_nodes() method on TaskGraph, and implemented the spec discovery module with discover_specs() function supporting sorted discovery, --spec filtering, missing directory handling, and tasks.md presence detection. All 15 tests (14 unit + 1 property) pass.

Implemented task group 3 (task parser and graph builder) for specification 02_planning_engine. Created parse_tasks() to extract task groups, subtasks, and optional markers from tasks.md markdown, and parse_cross_deps() to parse cross-spec dependency tables from prd.md. Implemented build_graph() to construct a TaskGraph with nodes, intra-spec sequential edges, cross-spec edges, and dangling reference validation. All 26 tests pass with no regressions (134 total tests green).

Implemented task group 4 of specification 02_planning_engine: dependency resolver (Kahn's algorithm with deterministic tie-breaking), fast-mode filter (optional node removal with dependency rewiring), and plan persistence (JSON serialization/deserialization with corrupted file handling). All 42 task group 4 tests pass (28 unit, 7 property, 7 integration persistence) with no regressions on prior task groups.

Implemented task group 5 of spec 02_planning_engine: created the `agent-fox plan` CLI command in `agent_fox/cli/plan.py` with --fast, --spec, --reanalyze, and --verify options, wired up the full planning pipeline (discovery -> parsing -> building -> resolving -> fast mode -> persistence), registered the command in app.py, and verified all 187 tests pass with clean linter and type checks.

Checkpoint verification for 02_planning_engine task group 6. All 80 tests pass, linter and type checker clean, and `agent-fox plan` works end-to-end with the project's own .specs/ directory. Marked checkpoint checkbox as complete.

Task group 1 of specification 03_session_and_workspace: wrote 55 failing spec tests covering all test spec entries (TS-03-1 through TS-03-E7, TS-03-P1 through TS-03-P3). Created stub modules for workspace (worktree.py, git.py, harvester.py) and session (runner.py, context.py, prompt.py, timeout.py) packages with NotImplementedError stubs. Added pytest-asyncio dependency. 52 new tests fail (red), 3 property tests pass (validate data classes that are already defined), 187 existing tests pass (no regressions).

tests_added_or_modified.description: TS-03-1 (creation), TS-03-2 (destruction), TS-03-3 (stale removal), TS-03-E1 (git error), TS-03-E2 (destroy non-existent)
TS-03-10 (fast-forward merge), TS-03-11 (rebase on conflict), TS-03-E5 (no commits), TS-03-E6 (unresolvable conflict)
TS-03-4 (spec docs), TS-03-5 (memory facts), TS-03-E4 (missing spec file)
TS-03-6 (system and task prompts)

TS-03-P1 (worktree path uniqueness per spec/group pair)
TS-03-P2 (SessionOutcome fields well-formed)
TS-03-P3 (allowlist hook blocks all non-allowlisted commands)

sessions.summary: Implemented task group 2 (git operations and worktree management) for specification 03_session_and_workspace. Replaced NotImplementedError stubs in agent_fox/workspace/git.py with async git operations (run_git, create_branch, delete_branch, checkout_branch, has_new_commits, get_changed_files, merge_fast_forward, rebase_onto, abort_rebase) using asyncio.create_subprocess_exec. Implemented create_worktree and destroy_worktree in agent_fox/workspace/worktree.py with stale worktree/branch cleanup, feature branch creation, and empty directory cleanup. All 11 worktree unit tests and 1 property test pass, linter is clean, no regressions.

Implemented task group 3 of specification 03_session_and_workspace: context assembler (assemble_context in context.py), prompt builder (build_system_prompt and build_task_prompt in prompt.py), and session runner with allowlist hook (run_session and build_allowlist_hook in runner.py). Timeout enforcer was already implemented. All 36 unit and property tests pass with clean linting.

Implemented the harvester module (task group 4) for specification 03_session_and_workspace. The harvest() function integrates worktree changes into the development branch via fast-forward merge with rebase-retry fallback. All 7 harvester tests pass and the full test suite (242 tests) has no regressions.

Checkpoint verification for spec 03_session_and_workspace (task group 5). All 242 tests pass, linter clean, mypy clean after fixing a type error in runner.py where query() was called with a plain dict instead of ClaudeCodeOptions. Marked checkpoint complete.

Implemented task group 1 (Write failing spec tests) for specification 04_orchestrator. Created 82 failing tests across 9 test files covering all test spec entries (TS-04-1 through TS-04-18, TS-04-E1 through TS-04-E10, TS-04-P1 through TS-04-P5). Also created stub modules for all 6 engine components (sync, state, circuit, serial, parallel, orchestrator) with NotImplementedError so tests fail at assertion level. All 171 existing tests still pass.

tests_added_or_modified.description: Shared fixtures: MockSessionRunner, MockSessionOutcome, plan builder helpers, tmp paths, config fixtures
TS-04-2 ready tasks, TS-04-6 cascade blocking linear, TS-04-7 cascade blocking diamond, TS-04-E10 stall detection
TS-04-8 state persistence, TS-04-9 resume from state, TS-04-E3 corrupted state, TS-04-E4 plan hash mismatch

sessions.summary: Implemented task group 2 (graph sync and state persistence) for specification 04_orchestrator. Replaced stub implementations in sync.py with GraphSync (ready task detection, cascade blocking via BFS, stall detection, summary) and in state.py with StateManager (save/load JSON lines, record_session with cumulative totals, compute_plan_hash via SHA-256). All 37 tests pass (15 sync unit, 15 state unit, 3 sync property, 4 state property).

sessions.summary: Implemented task group 3 (serial execution and orchestrator core) for specification 04_orchestrator. Implemented SerialRunner with execute() and delay() methods, the full Orchestrator execution loop with plan loading, state management, retry logic, cascade blocking, inter-session delay, and resume support, plus SIGINT signal handling with double-SIGINT immediate exit. All 17 task group 3 tests pass with zero regressions across the full test suite (296 tests).

Implemented task group 3 (serial execution and orchestrator core) for specification 04_orchestrator. Implemented SerialRunner with execute() and delay() methods, Orchestrator with full execution loop (plan loading, state management, retry logic with error feedback, cascade blocking, stall detection, SIGINT handling), and signal handler with double-SIGINT support. sessions.summary: Implemented task group 4 (parallel execution) for specification 04_orchestrator. Replaced the ParallelRunner stub with a full asyncio-based concurrent runner using Semaphore for parallelism control and Lock for serialized state writes. Wired the parallel runner into the Orchestrator with serial/parallel dispatch selection based on config, parallel cancel_all on SIGINT, and exactly-once guarantees via in_progress status gating. All 10 parallel tests and 12 orchestrator tests pass with zero regressions (306 total tests pass).

Implemented task group 5 (circuit breaker and limits) for specification 04_orchestrator. Implemented CircuitBreaker class with check_launch() and should_stop() methods, wired it into the Orchestrator's main execution loop to enforce cost ceilings, session limits, and retry bounds, and added orchestrator-level integration tests for cost limit and session limit enforcement.

tests_added_or_modified.description: Added TestCostLimitStopsOrchestrator (TS-04-10) and TestSessionLimitStopsOrchestrator (TS-04-11) integration tests verifying orchestrator stops dispatching when cost or session limits are reached, and sets appropriate run_status

Types (Fact dataclass, Category/ConfidenceLevel enums) were already complete from task group 1 stubs. sessions.summary: Implemented task group 2 (Implement types and store) for specification 05_structured_memory. Types (Category StrEnum, ConfidenceLevel StrEnum, Fact dataclass) were already complete from task group 1 stubs. Implemented the JSONL store module (store.py) with _fact_to_dict, _dict_to_fact, append_facts, load_all_facts, load_facts_by_spec, and write_facts functions. All 14 unit tests and 4 property tests pass, linter clean.

Implemented task group 3 (extraction) for specification 05_structured_memory. Replaced NotImplementedError stubs in agent_fox/memory/extraction.py with working implementations of extract_facts() and _parse_extraction_response(). The extract_facts() function calls the Anthropic API via AsyncAnthropic, resolves the model via resolve_model(), and delegates parsing to _parse_extraction_response(). The parser validates categories (defaulting unknown to gotcha), validates confidence levels (defaulting unknown to medium), generates UUIDs and timestamps, and handles invalid JSON by raising ValueError (caught by the caller which logs a warning and returns empty list). All 9 extraction tests pass, linter is clean, and all 18 prior tests still pass (no regressions).

Implemented task group 4 (context selection/filter) for specification 05_structured_memory. Replaced stub implementations in agent_fox/memory/filter.py with working select_relevant_facts() and _compute_relevance_score() functions that match facts by spec_name and keyword overlap, score with keyword count + recency bonus, and enforce budget limits. All 8 unit tests, 1 property test, and 27 baseline tests pass with no regressions.

Implemented task group 5 (compaction and render) for specification 05_structured_memory. Implemented compact(), _deduplicate_by_content(), and _resolve_supersession() in compaction.py, and render_summary(), _render_fact() in render.py. All 51 unit and property tests pass, linter clean.

Checkpoint verification for specification 05_structured_memory task group 6. All 51 memory tests pass, linter is clean, and mypy type check now passes after fixing pre-existing union-attr errors in extraction.py by adding proper TextBlock type narrowing.

Task group 1 for spec 06_hooks_sync_security: wrote all failing spec tests (62 failing, 6 passing) covering hook runner (TS-06-1 through TS-06-8), security/allowlist (TS-06-9 through TS-06-14), hot-load (TS-06-15, TS-06-16), edge cases (TS-06-E1 through TS-06-E7), and property tests (TS-06-P1 through TS-06-P4). Created stub modules for agent_fox/hooks/runner.py, agent_fox/hooks/security.py, and agent_fox/engine/hot_load.py with NotImplementedError stubs.

tests_added_or_modified.description: Shared fixtures: tmp_hook_script, hook_context, hook_config, marker_file, security_config, tmp_specs_dir
Hook runner tests: TS-06-1 to TS-06-8, TS-06-E1, TS-06-E2 (pre/post-session order, abort/warn modes, timeout, env vars, sync barrier context, no-hooks bypass, no hooks configured, hook not found)

Security tests: TS-06-9 to TS-06-14, TS-06-E3, TS-06-E4, TS-06-E6 (default allowlist, allowed/blocked commands, path extraction, custom/extend allowlist, empty command, non-Bash passthrough, both options precedence)
Hot-load tests: TS-06-15, TS-06-16, TS-06-E5, TS-06-E7 (discover new specs, no-op when no new specs, invalid dependency skipped, sync interval zero)

Property test TS-06-P4: hot-load monotonicity (existing nodes never removed)

sessions.summary: Implemented task group 2 (Platform protocol and NullPlatform) for specification 10_platform_integration. All 22 unit tests and 3 property tests pass.

Implemented GitHubPlatform class (task group 3, spec 10_platform_integration). Replaced all NotImplementedError stubs with full implementations: _verify_gh_available() checks gh CLI installation and authentication, _run_gh() async helper, create_pr() with label support and auto-merge, wait_for_ci() with JSON polling and timeout, wait_for_review() with review decision polling, and merge_pr() with error handling. All 16 GitHub tests and 38 total platform tests pass with clean linter output.

Implemented task group 4 (factory and integration wiring) for specification 10_platform_integration. Implemented the create_platform() factory function that routes 'none' to NullPlatform and 'github' to GitHubPlatform, raises ConfigError for unknown types, and passes through ci_timeout and auto_merge config values. Updated package __init__.py to export all four public symbols: Platform, create_platform, NullPlatform, GitHubPlatform. All 48 platform tests pass (unit + property), linter and type checker clean.
Checkpoint verification for spec 10_platform_integration task group 5. All 48 platform tests (unit + property) pass, linter and type checker are clean. Updated checkpoint checkbox to [x].

sessions.summary: Implemented task group 2 (database infrastructure) for specification 11_duckdb_knowledge_store. Implemented the schema migration system (migrations.py) with get_current_version, apply_pending_migrations, and record_version functions. Implemented the database connection manager (db.py) with KnowledgeDB class providing open/close lifecycle, context manager, VSS extension setup, full schema initialization with idempotent DDL, and the open_knowledge_store graceful degradation wrapper. Updated knowledge package __init__.py with public exports. Fixed a flaky hypothesis deadline in the property test.

All 24 unit tests, 3 property tests, and full regression suite (665 tests) pass.

Completed task group 4 (Integration and graceful degradation) for specification 11_duckdb_knowledge_store. Verified graceful degradation behaviors (open_knowledge_store returns None on corrupted DB, DuckDB sink swallows write failures, SinkDispatcher isolates sink failures) and wired up the public API in __init__.py to export all knowledge store types: KnowledgeDB, open_knowledge_store, SessionSink, SinkDispatcher, SessionOutcome, ToolCall, ToolError, DuckDBSink, JsonlSink.
